overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character approaching a Trade Authority counter in a dimly lit industrial space station office. The character interacts briefly with an NPC employee before turning and walking away toward the exit area.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Trade Authority counter

notable_agents.action: Trade Authority employee standing behind the counter wearing a green and yellow outfit

entered.detail: worn yellow sign with black text reading TRADE AUTHORITY mounted on the wall behind the counter
large curved white desk with computer equipment
futuristic printer or terminal device sitting on the counter
blue office chair positioned behind the counter
circular ventilation fan mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Trade Authority counter in a dimly lit industrial office space. A lone employee stands behind the white curved desk beneath a worn yellow sign, with office equipment and a chair visible behind the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: Trade Authority office interior with back storage visible

events.description: camera begins orbiting clockwise around the character to reveal more of the office interior
second employee becomes visible standing near metal shelving in the background

agents.ego_description: standing at the counter facing the Trade Authority employee

notable_agents.action: Trade Authority employee gesturing with hands while standing behind the counter
second employee standing near metal shelving units in the back office area

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units against the back wall
recessed area with additional storage and equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around the character at the counter, revealing the back office area with metal shelving and a second employee. The Trade Authority sign shifts to the right side of the frame as the perspective changes, showing more of the industrial interior.

events.description: character turns away from the counter and walks toward the exit area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the counter and walking toward the office exit

entered.detail: couch or bench seating area visible in the background
open doorway leading to the next section of the facility
section of metal grate flooring near the counter edge

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the counter and walks toward the exit, revealing a lounge area with seating and an exit corridor. The metal shelving unit now appears on the right side of the frame as the camera follows the character's departure from the Trade Authority desk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused interaction at a service counter and expands to reveal the wider industrial layout of a space station office. It begins as the character approaches a white curved Trade Authority desk where a lone employee stands beneath a worn yellow sign. As the camera orbits the character, the perspective shifts to uncover the back office area, bringing metal shelving and a second employee into view while the sign slides toward the edge of the frame. The scene then opens further as the character turns away from the desk, with the camera following their departure past the shelving unit. Finally, the view expands to reveal a lounge area with seating and a corridor leading toward the exit.
